g.text: Cell colour: home goal difference (− away win, + home win)

path.style: fill: none; stroke: #9c9382; stroke-width: 1.875; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-linecap: square

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 24px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #1a1a1a

g.text: WC-2026 group stage — every game, every verdict

text.style: font-size: 12px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: start; fill: #404040

g.text: Per panel: TOP — 4×4 head-to-head matrix (cell colour = home-team goal difference, vlag scale). BOTTOM — points table with green / red bars for goals for / against; the soft green band marks the top-two advancers in each group.

text.style: font-style: italic; font-size: 8px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: end; fill: #8c8377
